creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
A recent update caused Xorg to crash and burn on my ThinkPad T61 with Intel Mobile GL960/GM965.

The module seems to load fine (screen resolution switches and system continues to function), but starting Xorg causes a system crash.

This is ancient hardware, so not a priority, but I'm interested in learning more about how to resolve issues like this.  If someone can guide me through this problem, I may be able to contribute in the future.
